description: Richard Wu, co-founder of Tensor, announces the open-sourcing of the Tensor ecosystem, which includes the NFT marketplace and various protocols. He highlights the new business model with a 50/50 fee split between the Tensor Foundation treasury and developers. Wu invites developers to build on Tensor and mentions the launch of a grant program.
topic_summary: At [t=0:03], Richard Wu introduces Tensor as the leading NFT marketplace on Solana, boasting over $2 billion in volume. The platform is now fully open-sourced, allowing developers to integrate without permission. Wu emphasizes a new business model with a 50/50 fee split and encourages innovation on the platform.
